     Use fictional or redacted examples only. -->

## Skill or template affected

- **Practice area:** <!-- e.g. Contracts -->
- **Section(s) to change:** <!-- Purpose, Use When, Required Inputs, Do Not Use When,
     Legal Safety Rules, Workflow, Output Format, Attorney Verification Checklist, or a template -->

## What should improve

<!-- What is unclear, incomplete, inconsistent, or wrong in the current skill or template? -->

## Suggested change

<!-- Describe the improvement. Keep it Markdown-first and consistent with the standard
     SKILL.md structure. -->

## Legal safety dimension

Does this improvement touch any of the following? Check all that apply.

- [ ] Legal safety (draft-only framing, attorney review)
- [ ] Citation discipline (no invented authority, citations, or quotations)
- [ ] Confidentiality or privilege
- [ ] Output formatting / structure
- [ ] None of the above

## Jurisdiction-specific concern

     Otherwise write "none". -->
